reason: PSD scanning flow, scan result shape, psd_templates cache schema, IPC names, and Windows-only Photoshop behavior.
Windows-only guard requirement and non-Windows graceful failure behavior.
JSX/result JSON temp files must use .workbench/tmp/photoshop task directories and 24h cleanup.
Main-process service and IPC guideline index.
AppError and actionable error behavior guidance.

note: REAL_PS evidence: `$env:REAL_PS='1'; pnpm -F @tengyu-aipod/client exec vitest run src/main/photoshop/psd-scanner.test.ts --reporter=verbose` passed on Windows. The test scanned `C:\Users\niilo\Desktop\钥匙扣x.psd` and `C:\Users\niilo\Desktop\mao 杯子.psd` through real Photoshop COM. REAL_PS_MUTATE was not set; the JSX closes only the PSD document opened by the scan with DONOTSAVECHANGES and never quits Photoshop.
